$schema.description: Path to this JSON schema, enabling editor autocomplete.

units.description: All unit/entity stat records, in table order.

name.description: The unit/entity's identifier (a developer label), e.g. "airplane".

armor.description: Armor class; selects which column of a weapon's ammo-damage matrix applies to this unit. Optional - omit it and the engine defaults to "none".

health.description: Hit points; the engine reads this as an integer.

fireDelay.description: Seconds between shots for this entity (its fire cadence).
